---
title: "Development"
---

## Environment

```bash
conda activate admixture
poetry install --with dev
```

This project uses a `src/` package layout and Python 3.10+.

## Tests

Run unit tests that do not require Julia:

```bash
makim tests.unit
```

Run all tests:

```bash
makim tests.all
```

The integration test is skipped unless `ADMIXTURE_TEST_PLINK_PREFIX` points to a
real binary PLINK prefix and OpenADMIXTURE.jl is installed in the selected Julia
environment.

## Lint and type checks

```bash
makim lint.all
```

## Documentation

Render the Quarto website:

```bash
makim docs.build
```

Preview while editing:

```bash
makim docs.preview
```

Generated site files are written to `docs/_site/` and should not be committed.

## Design constraints

- Do not reimplement the OpenADMIXTURE algorithm in Python.
- Do not vendor OpenADMIXTURE.jl source code.
- Keep Julia as an external runtime.
- Use `subprocess.run(args, shell=False, capture_output=True, text=True)`.
- Treat PLINK input as a prefix with `.bed`, `.bim`, and `.fam` files.
- Keep pure Python unit tests independent of Julia.
